basic_details.job_title: APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 135 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Eastern Power Distribution Company of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APEPDCL)
basic_details.short_information: The APEPDCL Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive conducted through a Common Recruitment Examination along with other AP Power Utilities - APTRANSCO, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, and APGENCO. Candidates selected through this common exam will be allotted to the respective utility based on merit, reservation, and preferences submitted at the time of application. This is one of the most sought-after engineering government job opportunities in Andhra Pradesh for 2026.

important_dates.objection period: Within 7 days of initial key release

application_fee.details: The application fee for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates, regardless of category. The fee must be paid through the Payment Gateway from 30 June 2026 to 20 July 2026. The fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. Upon payment, a Journal Number will be issued which is needed to proceed with the application submission - note that receiving a Journal Number alone does not mean the application is complete.

age_limit.details: Candidates wondering about the age limit for APEPDCL AEE 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years as on 01/07/2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get a relaxed upper age limit of 47 years , and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are eligible up to 52 years of age. | Category Maximum Age (as on 01.07.2026) General / OC 42 years SC / ST / BC / EWS 47 years Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) 52 years

qualification.details: Only candidates who meet the educational and age eligibility as of the notification date (25 June 2026) are eligible to apply for APEPDCL Assistant Executive Engineer 2026. All qualifications must be from universities recognised by UGC and approved by AICTE. Degrees obtained through Distance Mode from State Universities outside Andhra Pradesh are not legally valid for this recruitment. | Candidates wondering about the age limit for APEPDCL AEE 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years as on 01/07/2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get a relaxed upper age limit of 47 years, and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are eligible up to 52 years of age.

salary_details.details: Candidates selected under APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 will be placed on probation for a period of 2 years on duty within a continuous period of 3 years. During probation, they will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000. After successful completion of probation, the regular pay scale will be made applicable. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now | AEE (Electrical) candidates selected must mandatorily work in prescribed areas during the first five years (including probation): 2 years in MRT/Construction wings and 3 years in Operation/Office posts in Rural/Tribal areas. No transfer requests to office or headquarters during this period will ordinarily be entertained. Promotion/SGP increments become applicable only after completing this tenure.

selection_process: The APEPDCL AEE 2026 selection is entirely based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) - there is no interview stage. The exam will be conducted jointly for APTRANSCO
and candidates selected will be allotted to a utility based on merit
and the preferences indicated in their application. There are no negative marks in the CBT.
The CBT consists of 100 questions for 100 marks - the same pattern applies to all three posts (Electrical

Civil). The question paper is divided into Core subject questions (70 marks) and General sections (30 marks combined). Minimum qualifying marks must be secured to be considered for certificate verification.

Candidates should note that merely securing minimum qualifying marks does not guarantee a call for certificate verification. Selection at 1:1 ratio for certificate verification also does not vest any right to final selection. No TA/DA is payable for attending CBT or certificate verification.
The CBT is scheduled between 22 and 29 August 2026. The initial answer key will be released on the 2nd day after the last exam

with a 7-day window for objections. The final key follows within 7 days of the objection deadline. The merit list (with marks) is expected to be announced tentatively in the last week of September 2026. Marks will be normalised using a standard normalization formula when the exam is held in multiple shifts.
how_to_apply: The APEPDCL AEE Apply Online 2026 process is entirely online through the official portal. Candidates must use an Aadhaar-linked mobile number for OTP-based registration - the same mobile number will be used throughout the examination process. The application portal is available at apeasternpower.com or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs.
Visit the official portal: apeasternpower.com or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in.
Click on the New Registration link and register using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number. An OTP will be sent to this number for verification.
After successful registration, log in using the credentials (Registration ID and password). Note these down carefully - a retrieval option is available if credentials are lost.
Fill in the online application form with all required personal, educational, and category details.
Indicate your preference for Power Utility (APEPDCL, APTRANSCO, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, APGENCO) and Zone/Unit - these preferences are final and cannot be changed after submission.
Upload scanned copies of all required documents and certificates. Illegible or tampered documents will lead to rejection. Hall Ticket will not be generated if certificates are not uploaded.
Upload a recent passport-size photograph and scanned signature.
Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 through the Payment Gateway. Note the Journal Number issued upon payment.
Complete the application form submission. A Journal Number alone does not confirm submission - complete all steps including document upload and form fill-up.
Take a printout of the final submitted application for future reference. No fields in the application form should be left blank.

Important: Candidates should apply well before the last date to avoid last-day technical rush. Applications sent through any mode other than online will not be entertained. Candidates submitting false information or fake certificates are liable for criminal prosecution and cancellation of selection.

content_sections.heading: APEPDCL AEE Notification 2026 – PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: The APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 official notification PDF was released on 25 June 2026 by the Chairman and Managing Director, Prudhvi Tej Immadi, I.A.S., from Visakhapatnam. The notification carries complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, exam pattern, syllabus, pay scale, and the application process. Candidates must read the full notification before submitting their application to avoid disqualification.

content_sections.heading: APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 – Quick Overview
content_sections.text: The APEPDCL Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive conducted through a Common Recruitment Examination along with other AP Power Utilities - APTRANSCO, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, and APGENCO. Candidates selected through this common exam will be allotted to the respective utility based on merit, reservation, and preferences submitted at the time of application. This is one of the most sought-after engineering government job opportunities in Andhra Pradesh for 2026.

rows.information: Eastern Power Distribution Company of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APEPDCL)

content_sections.heading: APEPDCL AEE Notification 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for APEPDCL AEE Vacancy 2026 must note all critical deadlines carefully. The online application portal opens on 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs and closes on 20 July 2026 at 23:59 Hrs - the same deadline applies for fee payment and certificate upload. The tentative examination is scheduled between 22 August 2026 and 29 August 2026 . No applications will be accepted after the deadline under any circumstances.

rows.event: Last Date to Apply Online & Pay Fee

rows.tentative_date_timeline: Within 7 days of initial key release

content_sections.heading: APEPDCL AEE Vacancy 2026 – Post-Wise and Category-Wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The APEPDCL AEE 2026 recruitment fills a total of 135 vacancies across three engineering disciplines. The largest share belongs to the Electrical discipline with 128 posts, followed by Civil with 4 posts and Telecom with 3 posts. The table below gives the complete category-wise breakdown for each discipline as per the Presidential Order (Local Cadre reservation). Note: Carried-forward vacancies are reserved for women candidates. Horizontal reservations include 33⅓% for Women and 4% for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities across all categories. Vacancies notified are provisional and may increase or decrease based on administrative requirements. APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 200 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only candidates who meet the educational and age eligibility as of the notification date (25 June 2026) are eligible to apply for APEPDCL Assistant Executive Engineer 2026. All qualifications must be from universities recognised by UGC and approved by AICTE. Degrees obtained through Distance Mode from State Universities outside Andhra Pradesh are not legally valid for this recruitment. Candidates wondering about the age limit for APEPDCL AEE 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years as on 01/07/2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get a relaxed upper age limit of 47 years , and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are eligible up to 52 years of age.

rows.required_degree: Degree in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering from a University established under a Central Act, Provincial Act, or State Act, recognised by AICTE and approved by UGC
Degree in Telecommunications / Electronics / Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognised University, approved by AICTE and UGC
Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognised University, approved by AICTE and UGC

content_sections.heading: Application Fee – APEPDCL AEE 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates , regardless of category. The fee must be paid through the Payment Gateway from 30 June 2026 to 20 July 2026 . The fee once paid is non-refundable under any circumstances. Upon payment, a Journal Number will be issued which is needed to proceed with the application submission - note that receiving a Journal Number alone does not mean the application is complete.

rows.category: All Categories (General / OC / SC / ST / BC / EWS / PwBD)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The APEPDCL AEE 2026 selection is entirely based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) - there is no interview stage. The exam will be conducted jointly for APTRANSCO, APEPDCL, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, and APGENCO, and candidates selected will be allotted to a utility based on merit, reservation, and the preferences indicated in their application. There are no negative marks in the CBT. The CBT consists of 100 questions for 100 marks - the same pattern applies to all three posts (Electrical, Telecom, Civil). The question paper is divided into Core subject questions (70 marks) and General sections (30 marks combined). Minimum qualifying marks must be secured to be considered for certificate verification. Candidates should note that merely securing minimum qualifying marks does not guarantee a call for certificate verification. Selection at 1:1 ratio for certificate verification also does not vest any right to final selection. No TA/DA is payable for attending CBT or certificate verification. The CBT is scheduled between 22 and 29 August 2026 . The initial answer key will be released on the 2nd day after the last exam, with a 7-day window for objections. The final key follows within 7 days of the objection deadline. The merit list (with marks) is expected to be announced tentatively in the last week of September 2026 . Marks will be normalised using a standard normalization formula when the exam is held in multiple shifts.

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale – APEPDCL AEE 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates selected under APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 will be placed on probation for a period of 2 years on duty within a continuous period of 3 years . During probation, they will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000 . After successful completion of probation, the regular pay scale will be made applicable. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now AEE (Electrical) candidates selected must mandatorily work in prescribed areas during the first five years (including probation): 2 years in MRT/Construction wings and 3 years in Operation/Office posts in Rural/Tribal areas . No transfer requests to office or headquarters during this period will ordinarily be entertained. Promotion/SGP increments become applicable only after completing this tenure.

rows.stage: During Probation (2 years on duty within 3 years)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online – APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The APEPDCL AEE Apply Online 2026 process is entirely online through the official portal. Candidates must use an Aadhaar-linked mobile number for OTP-based registration - the same mobile number will be used throughout the examination process. The application portal is available at apeasternpower.com or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs. Visit the official portal: apeasternpower.com or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in . Click on the New Registration link and register using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number. An OTP will be sent to this number for verification. After successful registration, log in using the credentials (Registration ID and password). Note these down carefully - a retrieval option is available if credentials are lost. Fill in the online application form with all required personal, educational, and category details. Indicate your preference for Power Utility (APEPDCL, APTRANSCO, APCPDCL, APSPDCL, APGENCO) and Zone/Unit - these preferences are final and cannot be changed after submission. Upload scanned copies of all required documents and certificates. Illegible or tampered documents will lead to rejection. Hall Ticket will not be generated if certificates are not uploaded. Upload a recent passport-size photograph and scanned signature. Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 through the Payment Gateway. Note the Journal Number issued upon payment. Complete the application form submission. A Journal Number alone does not confirm submission - complete all steps including document upload and form fill-up. Take a printout of the final submitted application for future reference. No fields in the application form should be left blank. Important: Candidates should apply well before the last date to avoid last-day technical rush. Applications sent through any mode other than online will not be entertained. Candidates submitting false information or fake certificates are liable for criminal prosecution and cancellation of selection.

content_sections.heading: APEPDCL AEE Apply Online 2026 – Direct Link
content_sections.text: The direct apply online link for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 is active from 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs through the official portal. Candidates are advised to complete registration and fee payment well before the closing date of 20 July 2026 at 23:59 Hrs . Bookmark both official portals and check regularly for updates or corrigenda issued by APEPDCL.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required – APEPDCL AEE 2026
content_sections.text: All required certificates must be uploaded at the time of application submission itself - they cannot be submitted separately at a later stage. If certificates are not uploaded before the last date, the Hall Ticket will not be generated. The following documents are required based on category and claim: Engineering degree certificate and mark sheets (relevant discipline) Date of birth proof (SSC/10th certificate) Community / Caste Certificate (SC/ST/BC/EWS) issued by the competent authority - EWS certificate must be issued within one year prior to the notification date Persons with Benchmark Disabilities: valid SADAREM Certificate (issued by the competent authority) Local Status Certificate (Study Certificate or Residence Certificate) - required to claim local candidate status Candidates who migrated from Telangana to Andhra Pradesh during 02.06.2014 to 01.06.2024: Local Status Certificate issued as per G.O. Ms. No. 161, GA (SPF & MC) Department, dated 27.12.2022 Recent passport-size photograph and scanned signature Aadhar card (linked mobile number required for OTP)

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – APEPDCL AEE Application 2026
content_sections.text: Based on patterns observed in similar AP Power Utility recruitment drives, the following are common errors that cost candidates their candidature. These are original editorial observations and not from the official notification: Not linking Aadhaar to your mobile number before applying: Registration requires an OTP sent to the Aadhaar-linked number. Candidates who have not linked their Aadhaar to their current mobile number cannot complete registration - do this at least 2–3 days before the portal opens. Uploading an outdated EWS certificate: The EWS certificate must be issued within one year prior to the notification date (i.e., after 25 June 2025). Older certificates will be rejected at verification. Confusing Journal Number with form submission: Many candidates mistake fee payment confirmation (Journal Number) for a completed application. You must log back in and complete the entire form with document uploads after payment. Selecting wrong utility or zone preferences: Preferences for Power Utility and Zone/Unit entered at the time of application are final. Once submitted, they cannot be changed. Careless selection here has long-term career impact. Uploading illegible or cropped documents: All uploaded certificates must be clear, legible scanned copies of originals. Tampered documents or partially visible scans will lead to outright rejection even if the candidate is otherwise eligible. Degree from Distance Mode via out-of-state universities: Engineering degrees awarded under Distance Mode through study centres of State Universities outside Andhra Pradesh are explicitly invalid for this recruitment. Do not apply if your degree falls in this category. Attempting external influence on posting preferences: The notification contains a strict Institutional Integrity clause - any attempt to apply external pressure or influence at any stage leads to permanent disqualification from this and all future APEPDCL recruitments.

faq.question: Q1. Has APEPDCL officially released the AEE Recruitment Notification 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, APEPDCL officially released the Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification on 25 June 2026 for 135 vacancies (Electrical: 128, Telecom: 3, Civil: 4). The notification was signed by Chairman and Managing Director Prudhvi Tej Immadi, I.A.S., from Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for APEPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026 at 23:59 Hrs. The same deadline applies for fee payment and certificate upload. The application portal opens on 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in APEPDCL AEE Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 135 vacancies are available - 128 for AEE (Electrical), 3 for AEE (Telecom), and 4 for AEE (Civil). These vacancies are provisional and may change based on administrative requirements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for APEPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Degree in the relevant engineering discipline — Electrical / Electrical & Electronics for the Electrical post; Telecom / Electronics / ECE for the Telecom post; and Civil Engineering for the Civil post — from a university recognised by AICTE and UGC. Distance Mode degrees from non-AP state universities are not valid.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 42 years as on 01.07.2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates can apply up to 47 years, and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities up to 52 years of age.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for APEPDCL AEE 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000 for all candidates, regardless of category. The fee is non-refundable and must be paid through the Payment Gateway between 30 June 2026 and 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for APEPDCL AEE posts?
faq.answer: During the probation period (2 years on duty within 3 years), selected candidates receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000. After successful probation completion, the regular Time Scale of Pay under RPS-2022 (starting at ₹86,245) applies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for APEPDCL Assistant Executive Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based solely on a Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks — there is no interview. The exam covers Core subject (70 marks) plus General Intelligence, General Awareness, English, Quantitative Aptitude, and Computer Knowledge (30 marks combined). There are no negative marks.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I apply for APEPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online at apeasternpower.com or apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 30 June 2026 at 10:00 Hrs.

faq.question: Q10. When is the APEPDCL AEE exam date 2026?
faq.answer: The tentative Computer Based Test (CBT) exam dates are 22 August 2026 to 29 August 2026. Hall Tickets will be available for download 7 days before the exam starts. Online Mock Tests will be available from 15 August 2026 onwards for practice.
